asset_deployments_block_source_check.name: asset_deployments_block_source_check
asset_deployments_block_source_check.value:
("asset_deployments"."deployment_block" is null and "asset_deployments"."deployment_block_source" is null)
        or ("asset_deployments"."deployment_block" >= 0 and "asset_deployments"."deployment_block_source" is not null)

global_savings_snapshots_amounts_check.name: global_savings_snapshots_amounts_check
global_savings_snapshots_amounts_check.value:
"global_savings_snapshots"."usdp_supply_on_savings_chains" ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        and "global_savings_snapshots"."susdp_total_assets" ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        and "global_savings_snapshots"."susdp_total_supply" ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        and ("global_savings_snapshots"."susdp_weighted_estimated_apy" is null
          or "global_savings_snapshots"."susdp_weighted_estimated_apy" ~ '^[0-9]+$')

savings_chain_snapshots_amounts_check.name: savings_chain_snapshots_amounts_check
savings_chain_snapshots_amounts_check.value:
"savings_chain_snapshots"."susdp_total_assets" ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        and "savings_chain_snapshots"."susdp_actual_assets" ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        and "savings_chain_snapshots"."susdp_pending_yield" ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        and "savings_chain_snapshots"."susdp_share_price_usdp" ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        and "savings_chain_snapshots"."susdp_rate" ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        and "savings_chain_snapshots"."susdp_estimated_apy" ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        and "savings_chain_snapshots"."susdp_max_rate" ~ '^[0-9]+$'

vault_snapshots_amounts_check.name: vault_snapshots_amounts_check
vault_snapshots_amounts_check.value:
"vault_snapshots"."usdp_total_supply" ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        and "vault_snapshots"."susdp_total_assets" ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        and "vault_snapshots"."susdp_actual_assets" ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        and "vault_snapshots"."susdp_total_supply" ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        and "vault_snapshots"."susdp_pending_yield" ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        and "vault_snapshots"."susdp_share_price_usdp" ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        and "vault_snapshots"."susdp_rate" ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        and "vault_snapshots"."susdp_estimated_apr" ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        and "vault_snapshots"."susdp_max_rate" ~ '^[0-9]+$'
